Any content (original or external) that can help Research Software Engineers in their learning journey. 
There are two main areas:

[**Knowledge Base**](/KB/index.qmd): Previous UW RSE community 
presentations, resources, and guides.

[**Projects**](/Projects/index.qmd): Projects created, managed,
and loved by UW RSE community members.

**Disclaimer**: The crowdsourced resources on this website are not endorsed by the UW-Madison and have not been vetted by the Division of Information Technology.
